title: brunelliaceae
intro: The Brunelliaceae rank is a family of flowering plants. This family is a group of closely related plant species that share similar characteristics and features. Brunelliaceae is primarily found in Australia, and it consists of a single genus, Brunnellia, which is now considered to belong to the family Cunoniaceae. The family Brunelliaceae has been recognized as a distinct family in some classifications, but its status is still debated among botanists.
